chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3871 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on CMA No.15802/2025 (Urgency). 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 4. 3. For orders on CMA No.15803/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case. 06.08.2025 Mr. Muhammad Riaz Abbasi, Advocate for the petitioner. --------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions, does not press the instant petition and submits that after amendment made by the Government of Sindh under the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025, he will approach the learned trial court for appropriate relief. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
